name: Electric Royalties Ltd.
description: Electric Royalties Ltd. is a royalty company established to take advantage of the demand for a wide range of commodities (lithium, vanadium, manganese, tin, graphite, cobalt, nickel, zinc and copper) that will benefit from the drive toward electrification of consumer, industrial and public transportation systems, and ancillary infrastructure. The company has a growing portfolio of royalties on projects globally, providing investors with diversified exposure to the clean energy transition.
